title: euphrasia regelii subsp. regelii
intro: Euphrasia regelii subsp. regelii, also known as Arctic or Alpenrose Eyebright, is a plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat eye problems and infections. The health benefits of Euphrasia regelii subsp. regelii include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with conditions such as conjunctivitis, and it is also used to treat respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Euphrasia regelii subsp. regelii is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used as an eye wash to treat eye infections and irritations.
